# GPUHunt

> GPUHunt (gpu-hunt.com) is a real-time GPU server price comparison platform. We aggregate live pricing from 20+ cloud providers so AI/ML engineers can instantly find the cheapest GPU for their workload.

## What GPUHunt does

- Aggregates live GPU server pricing from 20+ providers including Lambda Labs, CoreWeave, RunPod, Vast.ai, Hetzner, DigitalOcean, Vultr, Hyperstack, FluidStack, OVHcloud, Scaleway, TensorDock, DataCrunch, Genesis Cloud, Paperspace, Oblivus, Thunder Compute, Jarvis Labs, Salad Cloud, and Latitude.sh
- Covers H100, H200, A100, A40, L40S, L4, RTX 4090, MI300X, and 30+ other GPU models
- Prices shown in USD per hour and per month
- Data refreshed regularly via scrapers

## Key pages

- /servers — Browse and filter all GPU servers by price, GPU model, provider, RAM, location
- /gpus — All GPU models with cheapest available price per model
- /gpu/[model] — Per-GPU pricing across all providers (e.g. /gpu/NVIDIA%20H100)
- /providers — All cloud providers with SLA, uptime, billing, and certification data
- /provider/[slug] — Per-provider page with all server listings and trust info
- /best-value — Best price-per-VRAM deals across providers
- /compare/[a]-vs-[b] — Side-by-side provider comparisons (e.g. /compare/lambda-labs-vs-runpod)
- /use-case/llm-training — Best GPUs for LLM training
- /use-case/inference — Best GPUs for AI inference
- /use-case/fine-tuning — Best GPUs for fine-tuning
- /use-case/image-generation — Best GPUs for image generation
- /use-case/embedding — Best GPUs for embeddings and RAG
- /location/us — US-based GPU servers
- /location/eu — EU-based GPU servers
- /location/apac — APAC GPU servers
- /api/servers — JSON API for programmatic access to server data

## Common questions GPUHunt answers

- What is the cheapest H100 cloud GPU?
- How much does an A100 cost per hour?
- Which cloud provider has the cheapest GPU?
- RunPod vs Lambda Labs — which is cheaper?
- What GPU should I use for LLM training?
- Where can I rent an RTX 4090 by the hour?
- Which cloud providers offer EU-based GPU servers?
- What is CoreWeave's uptime SLA?

## Data freshness

Prices are scraped regularly. For the most current pricing, visit the live site at https://gpu-hunt.com.

## Contact

support@gpu-hunt.com
